description_long: This is a large, four-engine military-style airplane with a dark gray fuselage and distinctive red and yellow striped accents on the engine cowlings, tail, and wingtips. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, each supporting two propeller engines with yellow and red highlights. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all adorned with red and yellow stripes. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, featuring multiple window panels. Roundels and the number '30' are visible on the fuselage and wings, suggesting a military or historical context. The airplane's surface appears metallic and smooth, with visible panel lines and rivets, and the undercarriage is not visible, suggesting retractable landing gear.
description: A large, four-engine propeller airplane with a dark gray body, red and yellow striped accents, and a forward enclosed cockpit. The wings are mid-mounted and straight, with military-style markings and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, four engines, and the red/yellow striped tail and engine cowlings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the red horizontal stabilizers, four propellers, and the symmetrical tail design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the cockpit, engines, and tail markings.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cockpit canopy, four propeller engines, and the straight mid-mounted wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four piston engines, two mounted on each wing with visible propellers.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, all with striped markings.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, not visible in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-panel canopy and multiple seats.
